info.name: HSPK Module API Collection
info.description: Complete API collection for HSPK (Harga Satuan Pokok Kegiatan) module - managing standard unit prices for road construction activities. HSPK contains pricing information linked to ruang lingkup (scope of work).

variable.description: Base URL for the API server
JWT access token obtained from login
API prefix (api/dev/v1 for development, api/v1 for production)

item.name: CRUD Operations

request.description:
Create a new HSPK (Harga Satuan Pokok Kegiatan) record. Requires ADMIN or SUPERADMIN role.

**Fields:**
- `id_ruang_lingkup` (number, required): ID of the ruang lingkup (scope of work)
- `no_mata_pembayaran` (string, required): Payment code/number (must be unique)
- `satuan` (string, required): Unit of measurement (e.g., m^1, m2, m3, unit, etc.)
- `harga_satuan` (number, required, min: 0): Unit price

**Note:** `no_mata_pembayaran` must be unique across all HSPK records.

Update an existing HSPK record. All fields except `id` are optional. Requires ADMIN or SUPERADMIN role.

**Fields:**
- `id` (number, required): HSPK ID to update
- `id_ruang_lingkup` (number, optional): New ruang lingkup ID
- `no_mata_pembayaran` (string, optional): New payment code (must be unique if changed)
- `satuan` (string, optional): New unit of measurement
- `harga_satuan` (number, optional, min: 0): New unit price

Delete an HSPK record by ID. Requires ADMIN or SUPERADMIN role.

**Fields:**
- `id` (number, required): HSPK ID to delete

item.description: CRUD operations for HSPK management - All endpoints require ADMIN or SUPERADMIN role

item.name: Query Endpoints

request.description:
Get paginated list of all HSPK records. Requires ADMIN or SUPERADMIN role.

**Query Parameters:**
- `page` (number, optional, min: 1): Page number (default: 1)
- `amount` (number, optional, min: 1): Items per page

**Response includes:**
- `data`: Array of HSPK objects
- `total`: Total number of HSPK records
- `page`: Current page number
- `limit`: Items per page
- `totalPages`: Total number of pages

Get detailed information for a specific HSPK by ID. Requires ADMIN or SUPERADMIN role.

**Query Parameters:**
- `id` (number, required): HSPK ID to retrieve

**Returns:** Complete HSPK object with all fields

item.name: Get HSPK by No Mata Pembayaran

request.description:
Get HSPK by payment code (no_mata_pembayaran). Requires ADMIN or SUPERADMIN role.

**Query Parameters:**
- `no_mata_pembayaran` (string, required): Payment code to search for

**Returns:** HSPK object if found, 404 if not found

Get all HSPK records associated with a specific ruang lingkup (scope of work). Requires ADMIN or SUPERADMIN role.

**Query Parameters:**
- `id_ruang_lingkup` (number, required): Ruang lingkup ID

**Returns:** Array of HSPK objects associated with the specified ruang lingkup

item.description: Query endpoints for retrieving HSPK information - All require ADMIN or SUPERADMIN role
